footer.brand_description: Creating meaningful spaces that tell your story through thoughtful design and attention to detail.

slide1.line2: It's about YOU, your STORY , your CONNECTIONS

intro.text: Our INTERIORS are DESIGNED to stimulate the SENSES awaken EMOTIONS and CREATE new EXPERIENCES and RITUALS — inspiring NEW WAYS of LIVING.

services_preview.label: Our Services
services_preview.text: We are a DESIGN STUDIO dedicated to delivering a BESPOKE start-to-finish DESIGN SERVICE, crafted with QUALITY, PRECISION and PROFESSIONALISM.

about_preview.text: We don't just create beautiful homes, we design meaningful spaces that tell your story, and inspire experiences where memories are built.

hero.title: About Us
paragraphs: The essence of our work lies in the art of thinking and designing spaces with a particular and personal narrative in each project.
We believe in an empathetic, intimate approach, carefully tailored to each individual, their story, and their connections.
Our training and past experience shape our professionalism, but it is the way we see, feel, and think that sets us apart, creating truly distinctive solutions.
With a sensory and emotional perspective, we craft humanized, functional, coherent, and balanced designs, shaping environments that radiate harmony, well-being, and serenity.
Recognizing the profound impact spaces have on well-being and quality of life, we give meaning to the experiences they nurture.
Our aim is to stimulate the senses, evoke emotions, and inspire new experiences and rituals … NEW WAYS OF LIVING.
Our interiors are immersive, serene, elegant, and deeply meaningful.
By working closely with our clients, each project evolves into a journey of connection and interaction, transforming the process into a truly unique and pleasant experience.

items.title: Authenticity
items.description: Every project is a unique reflection of its inhabitants. We listen deeply to create spaces that feel genuinely yours.

items.title: Quality
items.description: We believe in investing in materials, craftsmanship, and details that stand the test of time.

items.title: Collaboration
items.description: Design is a dialogue. We work closely with clients, artisans, and craftspeople to realize exceptional results.

items.title: Sustainability
items.description: Thoughtful design considers its impact. We prioritize materials and practices that respect our environment.

founder.label: The Founder
founder.title: The Vision Behind Our Designs
paragraphs: With over a decade of experience in architecture and interior design, our founder brings a refined aesthetic sensibility and deep understanding of how spaces shape our daily experiences.
Trained in classical architecture with a passion for contemporary design, she bridges tradition and innovation to create spaces that feel both timeless and fresh.
"I believe that the best interiors are those that evolve with their inhabitants, that tell a story and invite new chapters to be written."

cta.text: Let us be part of your story...

instagram.text: INSPIRATION through DESIGN. Welcome to our WORLD and get INSPIRED...

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We begin with an in-depth consultation to understand your vision, lifestyle, and requirements.

steps.title: Concept
steps.description: Our team develops initial concepts, mood boards, and spatial layouts for your approval.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Detailed designs, material selections, and technical drawings bring the vision to life.

steps.title: Execution
steps.description: We oversee every aspect of implementation, ensuring quality and attention to detail.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Final styling and handover of your transformed space, ready to be lived in and loved.

architecture.subtitle: Architectural solutions that create experiences
architecture.description:
From concept to completion, we design architectural solutions that balance form and function. Our architectural services encompass the complete journey from initial concept to final construction.

Every project begins with listening - to your aspirations, your lifestyle, and your vision for the space. From there, we develop solutions that are both functionally excellent and aesthetically inspiring.

interior-design.subtitle: Interior environments that reflect your lifestyle and soul
interior-design.description:
Creating cohesive interior environments that reflect your lifestyle and aspirations. Interior design is where vision meets reality.

Our approach combines careful space planning with a keen eye for materials, colors, and textures. The result is spaces that feel both curated and lived-in, sophisticated yet welcoming.

decoration.subtitle: Interior environments that reflect your lifestyle and soul
decoration.description:
Curating furniture, art, and accessories to bring your space to life with personality. Decoration is the layer that brings warmth and uniqueness to any space.

Whether refreshing a single room or styling an entire home, we bring an expert eye and access to exclusive sources to elevate your interiors.

bespoke-furniture.subtitle: Custom furniture Designed to fit your unique space and style.
bespoke-furniture.description:
Custom furniture designed and crafted to perfectly fit your unique space and personal style. Each piece is conceived with purpose, balancing aesthetics and function.

From concept to production, we oversee every detail to ensure the result is a truly one-of-a-kind piece that elevates your interior.

consultancy.subtitle: Personalized expert guidance on Design solutions
consultancy.description:
Expert guidance on design decisions, materials, and spatial planning for your project. Not every project requires full-service design.

Whether you need help with a challenging layout, material decisions, or a second opinion on your design direction, we're here to guide you with clarity and expertise.

styling-staging.subtitle: Transforming spaces strategically to maximize appeal
styling-staging.description:
Transforming properties for sale or rent with strategic styling that maximizes appeal. First impressions matter.

We understand what buyers are looking for and create environments that allow them to envision themselves in the space. Strategic styling that makes all the difference.

cta.text: Let us be part of your story...

hero.text: A curated selection of our work, each project reflecting our commitment to create meaningful spaces that tell unique stories.

summer-house-comporta.description:
Inspired by the natural beauty of Comporta and the serene rice fields stretching towards the horizon, this summer house captures the essence of its unique landscape. The interior design unfolds through a harmonious palette of colours, textures, and organic materials, creating a calm and grounded atmosphere.

A true sanctuary for relaxation, this holiday retreat is designed for meaningful family moments, slow living, and the creation of lasting memories.

contemporary-city-house.description:
Elegant and understated, this contemporary city home embodies the soul of modern minimalism. A carefully curated monochromatic palette and clean architectural lines bring harmony and balance to the space, where every element has purpose and every detail speaks to refined simplicity.

Designed for a life lived with intention, the interiors merge functionality and beauty seamlessly. Natural light plays a central role, enhancing the sense of openness and calm. Thoughtful material choices and bespoke furniture pieces add subtle warmth, creating an environment that feels both sophisticated and deeply welcoming.

elegant-timeless-duplex.description:
Elegant and warm, this timeless duplex apartment was conceived to evoke the comfort and refinement of a boutique hotel, seamlessly adapted to the rhythm of multifunctional family living.

Thoughtfully designed to balance sophistication with everyday ease, the spaces flow naturally between social and private moments. Rich materials, soft textures, and carefully layered lighting create an atmosphere that feels both luxurious and genuinely welcoming - a home where every detail has been considered, and every room invites you to stay and create memories.
elegant-timeless-duplex.credits: TOTAL RENOVATION, INTERIOR ARCHITECTURE (co-autoria Carla Belo)

beach-house-troia.description:
Nestled within the sweeping dunes of Troia, this beach house reflects the pure essence of coastal living. Inspired by the soft sandy tones of its surroundings, the design embraces a minimalist and monochromatic aesthetic where simplicity and serenity take centre stage.

Created as a seasonal family retreat, the spaces combine comfort and functionality, flowing seamlessly to encourage relaxed living, quiet moments, and joyful gatherings. A refined yet effortless celebration of seaside living in Portugal.

pombaline-restoration-principe-real.description:
Located in the heart of Príncipe Real, this Pombaline building underwent a full rehabilitation to adapt each apartment to contemporary living while preserving its original character.

Despite its advanced deterioration, key historical features—such as traditional tile panels, the original staircase, and traces of frescoes—were carefully restored to retain the soul of the building in the communal areas.

Inside the apartments, where the alterations were most visible, a contemporary, neutral, and timeless design language was introduced, elegant yet understated, ensuring comfort and coherence while respecting the architectural identity of the Pombaline structure.

rural-retreat.description:
Set in the peaceful interior of Portugal, this rural retreat offers a soothing escape from the rush of everyday life.

Designed for those seeking tranquillity and authentic connection, it carries the charm of a traditional village home filled with history, textures, and quiet corners.

Rooted in natural materials and vernacular architecture, the project preserves heritage while subtly reinterpreting it. Each space enhances comfort and sensory warmth, transforming the house into a sanctuary for rest, reflection, and deep rejuvenation.

store-restauration-atelier.description:
In a contemporary reinterpretation of traditional historic-centre shops, this store-gallery emerges as a space where architecture, curation, and restoration coexist seamlessly.

The project celebrates each object and its renewed meaning through an integrated restoration atelier, emphasizing authenticity, craftsmanship, and design.

A minimalist aesthetic, thoughtfully designed lighting, and a neutral material palette create a calm atmosphere that highlights every piece, giving it a near-museographic presence and an immersive sense of discovery.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This privacy policy describes how personal information is collected, used and protected.

sections.title: Information Collection
sections.content: We only collect data required to respond to contact requests and provide our services. This may include your name, email address, and phone number when provided through our contact forms.

sections.title: Use of Information
sections.content: The information collected is used exclusively to provide you with the services requested, improve our website, and communicate with you about your projects.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: We use essential cookies to ensure the website functions correctly. We may also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our content, always respecting your preferences.

sections.title: Data Protection
sections.content: We apply reasonable security measures to protect stored information from unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties.

sections.title: User Rights
sections.content: You can request access, correction, or removal of your personal data at any time by contacting us directly through our official channels.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: Please read these terms carefully before using our website.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.

sections.title: Use of the Website
sections.content: The content on this website is for your general information and use only. It is subject to change without notice. Unauthorized use of this website may give rise to a claim for damages.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All designs, images, and content on this website are the property of RAIZ Interiors. Reproduction is prohibited other than in accordance with the copyright notice.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: RAIZ Interiors will not be liable for any damages arising from the use of this website or the information contained herein.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: Your use of this website and any dispute arising out of such use is subject to the laws of Portugal.
